prompt:
Create a cinematic street portrait of the woman standing in the middle of a crowded city street while looking back over her shoulder directly toward the camera. She wears a minimalist oversized black wool coat, with a simple dark backpack over one shoulder. Loose natural hair gently blows in the wind with a few soft strands across the face.

The subject remains perfectly sharp and in focus while hundreds of pedestrians move rapidly around her with strong motion blur, creating the feeling that time has stopped only for her. The background crowd should be almost entirely monochrome (black & white/desaturated), while the subject remains in natural warm colors, making her stand out dramatically.

Camera angle: eye-level, slightly telephoto composition.

Lens: Sony A1, 85mm f/1.4 GM, shot at f/1.6, ISO 100, 1/200 sec, cinematic shallow depth of field, creamy bokeh, tack-sharp eyes, premium editorial photography.

Lighting: soft overcast natural daylight with subtle cinematic grading, warm skin tones, cool gray surroundings, gentle rim light on the hair, realistic HDR dynamic range, rich contrast, premium Vogue editorial look.

Color grading: muted urban palette, desaturated environment, natural skin tones, warm highlights, cool shadows, Kodak Portra-inspired cinematic colors.

Composition: vertical portrait, subject centered, authentic city atmosphere, emotional storytelling, luxury fashion editorial, award-winning street photography.

Ultra-photorealistic, masterpiece, 8K, HDR, Sony Alpha realism, extremely detailed skin texture, realistic hair strands, cinematic motion blur, perfect facial focus, premium full-frame quality.

Negative Prompt: cartoon, CGI, AI artifacts, extra limbs, duplicate people, distorted face, plastic skin, oversaturated colors, low quality, blur on subject, watermark, logo, text, unrealistic lighting, bad anatomy.
